name: Pioneer Saloon
tagline: Japanese-Hawaiian fusion plate lunches on Monsarrat Ave — the garlic ahi and curry are legendary neighborhood favorites.
parking: Street parking on Monsarrat Ave; arrive early
talkStory: This tiny Monsarrat Avenue joint near Diamond Head serves Japanese-Hawaiian fusion plate lunches that punch way above their weight. The garlic ahi steak plate is the signature — seared rare with a rich garlic butter sauce over rice. The Japanese curry is thick, fragrant, and homestyle. A perfect post-Diamond Head hike meal. The line moves fast but seating is limited; many locals take it to nearby Kapiolani Park.
